title: They Have Craft – Hal Puthoff Exposes Hidden Tech Arms Race 👽🚨 @joerogan #SecretArmsRace #UAP

transcript.text: There are paranormal things, purely
non-physical, possibly psychokinesis. I
have to admit, I have such a strong
visceral negative
reaction. Jesse was interested in this
UFO UAP stuff. It is plausible that
there was also a secret technological
arms race focused on reverse engineering
UFO technology. And I couldn't be in the
room with it. I found out that I was
apparently wrong about that. The federal
government is certainly tracking this.
It doesn't make any sense to me still.
He said, "Uh, I need you to come to
Washington." I saw people, some of whom
I knew, including my ex-contract monitor
from CIA, a lot of military people and
so on. So, he sat us all down and said,
"Okay, here's the deal. The United
States, Russia, and China have obtained
ET craft that have crashed and we have
proof of that. Bodies that aren't
human." And so, the question is, can
this be released to the public? Anytime
you have a profound physical insight,
you have to ask yourself, what Pandora's
box would a new physical insight
potentially open? Because any change in
our physical understanding of the
universe can unlock holy hell.
